author: SharkyIsAKing
name: Counting Game
install_msg:
Thank you for installing Counter! Please make sure you set the channel using `[p]counter setchannel <channel>`.

Take a look at all the settings option in `[p]help counter` and enjoy the game!
description: A counting game cog. Users count up from 1, and if they mess up, the count resets to 1. They have 3 saves to prevent the reset, but they can also buy saves with their hard-earned coins.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
